lines.en_lit: MISHNA: Initially, whoever wishes to remove the altar removes them. And when there are many run and ascend on the ramp Any who precedes another four cubits is privileged And if both of them were equal the appointed Extend fingers,
And what do they extend one or two and do not extend a thumb in the Temple.

an incident where both of them were equal running and ascending on the ramp, and one of them shoved another and he fell and his leg was broken. And once the court saw that were coming to danger, they instituted that would remove the altar only of a lottery. There were four lotteries there, and this, the first lottery.

GEMARA: And what is the reason that the Sages did not initially institute a lottery for Initially thought: a service at night it would not be important to not come when they saw that did come and they were coming to danger they instituted a lottery.
But there is limbs and the fats which is a service night, and the Sages instituted a lottery the end of a daytime service,

this also the start of a daytime service, as Rabbi Yoḥanan said: sanctified his hands for the removal of the ashes, the next day, he need not sanctify because he already sanctified at the start of the service.
Say Because he had already sanctified at the outset for service.

Some say Initially, thought since there is overcome by sleep not would come. When they saw that they did come and they were also coming to danger, the Sages instituted a lottery But there is limbs and the fats which there is overcome by sleep, the Sages instituted a lottery Lying down is different from rising

But was the ordinance due to that reason The ordinance due to this reason: as it was taught who was privileged to the removal of the ashes was privileged with laying out the arrangement of wood the two logs

Rav Ashi said: There were two ordinances Initially, thought would not Once they saw that did come and they were also coming to danger, instituted a lottery Once they established a lottery did not come They said: Who says will fall in our favor? Then instituted for whoever was privileged with the removal of the ashes would be privileged with laying out the arrangement of wood two logs, so that would come and participate in the lottery.

when there were many Rav Pappa said: obvious to me four cubits on the ground, we learned run and ascend on the ramp, also not first we learned run and ascend on the ramp, and only afterward Any who precedes another
also not middle, the matter is not defined obvious to me we learned that are adjacent to the altar
raised a dilemma four cubits that they stated, including the cubit of the base and the cubit of ledge,
